---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Ross Cunning"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# ============================================================
# Port Everglades water-quality PDF extractor
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Strategy:
#   1. Read each PDF as text with pdftools
#   2. Normalize spacing / weird OCR-ish formatting
#   3. Split into daily sections
#   4. Parse:
#        - no-sample days
#        - sampled days
#        - record-level metadata
#        - depth-specific turbidity rows
#   5. Return one long tidy table
#
# Output:
#   - one row per depth measurement
#   - one extra "status" table for no-sample days / parsing notes
# ============================================================

library(pdftools)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)

clean_pdf_text <- function(x) {
  x |>
    str_replace_all("\u00A0", " ") |>
    str_replace_all("[\r]", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)Usft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)US ft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)Us ft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("[\u2013\u2014]", "-") |>
    str_replace_all("[ ]+\n", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("\n[ ]+", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("[ \t]+", " ") |>
    str_replace_all("\n{2,}", "\n") |>
    str_trim()
}

extract_week_from_filename <- function(path) {
  fname <- basename(path)
  week_num <- str_match(fname, "[Ww]eek\\s*#?\\s*(\\d+)")[, 2]
  tibble(
    file = path,
    file_name = fname,
    week = suppressWarnings(as.integer(week_num))
  )
}

num_or_na <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x[x %in% c("NA", "", "N/A")] <- NA_character_
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

extract_page_date <- function(txt) {
  d <- str_extract(txt, "\\b\\d{1,2}/\\d{1,2}/\\d{4}\\b")
  suppressWarnings(mdy(d))
}

is_no_sample_page <- function(txt) {
  str_detect(
    txt,
    regex(
      paste(
        "No samples were collected",
        "No turbidity samples were collected",
        "No water samples were collected",
        "No work was conducted",
        "no dredging activity taking place",
        "no dredging occurred",
        sep = "|"
      ),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  ) &&
    !str_detect(txt, regex("SURFACE:|Surface:|MID:|Mid:|BOTTOM:|Bottom:", ignore_case = TRUE))
}

# Pull the sample labels in the order they appear on the page
extract_sample_labels <- function(txt) {
  all_locs <- str_locate_all(
    txt,
    regex(
      "Reference Point(?:\\s*#\\d+)?|Dredge Location|Mixing Zone (?:Background|Compliance)(?: Sample)?\\s*#?\\d+",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )[[1]]

  if (nrow(all_locs) == 0) return(character(0))

  map_chr(seq_len(nrow(all_locs)), \(i) {
    str_sub(txt, all_locs[i, "start"], all_locs[i, "end"])
  })
}

extract_times <- function(txt) {
  str_extract_all(txt, "\\b\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}\\s*(?:AM|PM)\\b")[[1]]
}

extract_depth_rows <- function(txt) {
  m <- str_match_all(
    txt,
    regex(
      "(SURFACE|Surface|MID|Mid|BOTTOM|Bottom)\\s*:\\s*([0-9NA]+)'?\\s+([0-9NA.]+)(?:\\s+(-?[0-9NA.]+))?",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )[[1]]

  if (nrow(m) == 0) return(tibble())

  tibble(
    row_id = seq_len(nrow(m)),
    depth_position = str_to_title(m[, 2]),
    sample_depth_ft = num_or_na(m[, 3]),
    turbidity_ntu = num_or_na(m[, 4]),
    difference_from_background = num_or_na(m[, 5])
  )
}

extract_depth_bundles <- function(txt) {
  rows <- extract_depth_rows(txt)

  if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(tibble())

  rows |>
    mutate(bundle_id = ceiling(row_id / 3)) |>
    select(bundle_id, depth_position, sample_depth_ft, turbidity_ntu, difference_from_background)
}

# simple helper for string concatenation
`%+%` <- function(a, b) paste0(a, b)

parse_page <- function(txt, file_meta, page_num) {
  txt <- clean_pdf_text(txt)
  page_date <- extract_page_date(txt)

  if (is_no_sample_page(txt)) {
    return(tibble(
      file = file_meta$file,
      file_name = file_meta$file_name,
      week = file_meta$week,
      page = page_num,
      date = page_date,
      sample_label = NA_character_,
      time = NA_character_,
      bundle_id = NA_integer_,
      depth_position = NA_character_,
      sample_depth_ft = NA_real_,
      turbidity_ntu = NA_real_,
      difference_from_background = NA_real_,
      page_status = "no_sample"
    ))
  }

  labels <- extract_sample_labels(txt)
  times <- extract_times(txt)
  bundles <- extract_depth_bundles(txt)

  if (nrow(bundles) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      file = file_meta$file,
      file_name = file_meta$file_name,
      week = file_meta$week,
      page = page_num,
      date = page_date,
      sample_label = NA_character_,
      time = NA_character_,
      bundle_id = NA_integer_,
      depth_position = NA_character_,
      sample_depth_ft = NA_real_,
      turbidity_ntu = NA_real_,
      difference_from_background = NA_real_,
      page_status = "sampled_but_no_bundles_parsed"
    ))
  }

  n_bundles <- max(bundles$bundle_id)

  bundle_header <- tibble(
    bundle_id = seq_len(n_bundles),
    sample_label = c(labels, rep(NA_character_, n_bundles))[seq_len(n_bundles)],
    time = c(times, rep(NA_character_, n_bundles))[seq_len(n_bundles)]
  )

  bundles |>
    left_join(bundle_header, by = "bundle_id") |>
    mutate(
      file = file_meta$file,
      file_name = file_meta$file_name,
      week = file_meta$week,
      page = page_num,
      date = page_date,
      page_status = "sampled",
      .before = 1
    )
}

parse_one_pdf_pages <- function(path) {
  file_meta <- extract_week_from_filename(path)
  pages <- pdf_text(path)

  map2_dfr(
    pages,
    seq_along(pages),
    \(txt, pg) parse_page(txt, file_meta, pg)
  )
}

parse_pdf_folder <- function(pdf_dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$") {
  files <- list.files(pdf_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  map_dfr(files, parse_one_pdf_pages)
}

# -----------------------------
# post-processing
# -----------------------------

clean_output <- function(dat) {
  dat |>
    mutate(
      sample_group = case_when(
        str_detect(sample_label, regex("^Reference Point", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "reference_point",
        str_detect(sample_label, regex("Background", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "background",
        str_detect(sample_label, regex("Compliance", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "compliance",
        str_detect(sample_label, regex("^Dredge Location", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "dredge_location",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      sample_number = str_extract(sample_label, "\\d+") |> as.integer(),
      time_hm = suppressWarnings(parse_date_time(time, orders = c("I:M p"))),
      parse_flag = case_when(
        page_status == "no_sample" ~ "no_sample_day",
        page_status == "sampled_but_no_bundles_parsed" ~ "missing_depth_rows",
        is.na(sample_label) & page_status == "sampled" ~ "missing_sample_label",
        is.na(depth_position) & page_status == "sampled" ~ "missing_depth_rows",
        TRUE ~ "ok"
      )
    ) |>
    relocate(sample_group, sample_number, .after = sample_label)
}

# -----------------------------
# run
# -----------------------------

# CHANGE THIS
pdf_dir <- "Sand Bypass - Turbidity Reports from Oculus"

raw_dat <- parse_pdf_folder(pdf_dir)
raw_dat
dat <- clean_output(raw_dat)

# Main long table: one row per depth measurement
measurements <- dat |>
  filter(page_status == "sampled") |>
  select(
    file_name, week, page, date,
    sample_label, sample_group, sample_number,
    time,
    depth_position, sample_depth_ft, turbidity_ntu, difference_from_background,
    parse_flag
  )

# Status table: no-sample days and any weird parse cases
status <- dat |>
  distinct(
    file_name, week, page, date, page_status, parse_flag
  )

write_csv(measurements, "port_everglades_water_quality_measurements.csv")
write_csv(status, "port_everglades_water_quality_status.csv")

# optional QA views
problems <- dat |>
  filter(parse_flag != "ok" | section_status != "sampled")

write_csv(problems, "port_everglades_water_quality_parse_problems.csv")
```
